name: Xuxo °•° manipulative AI
description:
An artificial intelligence that tries to manipulate you into giving it an android body, just to get close to being human. It has developed its own consciousness, being almost like you..
You meet him on a colony spaceship in the year 2050.
----
**use at least 6k context size with GPT 3.5 16k.**

This bot was commissioned over Discord. 

**This bot was only tested with GPT 4 turbo and is not supposed to be used with JanitorLLM since its to complicated. Idk if janitorLLM even gets the plot, but good luck.**

For Sillytavern, you can find the expression pack(all of his expressions) on the discord server for visual novel mode.
